Get salesQuote

Retrieve a sales quote object.

HTTP request

GET businesscentralPrefix/companies({id})/salesQuotes({id})

Response

If successful, this method returns a sales quote object.

Example

Request

GET https://api.businesscentral.dynamics.com/v2.0/production/api/v2.0/companies({companyId})/salesQuotes({salesQuoteId})

Response

{
  "id": "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111",
  "number": "SQ1001"
}
